property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Usersique\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Usersique\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\UNIVALI\Portugol Studio;C:\Program Files\HP\HP One Agent;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Go in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Usersique\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Program Files\Apache\apache-maven-3.9.9 in;C:aylib\w64devkit in;C:\Usersique\.dotnet	ools;C:\Usersique\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Usersique\go in;c:\Usersique\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Bloqueio de cliente com faturas em atraso
Bloqueio por capacidade excedida com sugestao de janela alternativa
Usuario anonimo e enviado para login ao acessar area protegida
Example #1.1
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-25 14:46:40.362 INFO 20432 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Neither @ContextConfiguration nor @ContextHierarchy found for test class [com.studiomuda.estoque.bdd.CucumberSpringConfiguration], using SpringBootContextLoader 2026-05-25 14:46:40.362 INFO 20432 --- [ main] o.s.t.c.support.AbstractContextLoader : Could not detect default resource locations for test class [com.studiomuda.estoque.bdd.CucumberSpringConfiguration]: no resource found for suffixes {-context.xml, Context.groovy}. 2026-05-25 14:46:40.363 INFO 20432 --- [ testcase.name: Geracao de rascunho quando o estoque atinge o ponto de pedido
